title: Iuengliss
body:
# Iuengliss

Denver experimental project. Listed among Denver notables whose tracks were used in remix projects. Released a split cassette with **Hollagramz** (also a REMIX09 peer in the vault) — "Malaysian Caning" appears on that split.

## Connection to Colin

Track 10 of REMIX10: **"IUENGLISS-MALAYSIAN CANING (daymare mix)"** — the source track is the same one that appeared on the Hollagramz/Iuengliss split. Confirms Colin was pulling remix material from contemporary Denver-scene cassette releases.
